subcodes.first_line: That which flowed from thy pen hath reached Him Who causeth the rivers of everlasting life to stream forth amidst all created things and the crystal waters of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر ما جری من قلمک عند مجری انهار الحیوان بین الامکان و سلسبیل رحمه
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
